overall.description: A cinematic aerial drone shot through a dense cyberpunk cityscape during golden hour, showcasing towering megabuildings with neon signage and futuristic architecture. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring slow camera movement revealing the sprawling urban environment of Night City.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a sweeping view of a cyberpunk cityscape during golden hour, centered on a massive residential megabuilding. The camera slowly pans left, revealing dense clusters of skyscrapers on the right adorned with neon billboards. A flying vehicle cruises through the distant sky, emphasizing the futuristic setting.

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning left, the right-side buildings exit the frame while a new cluster of skyscrapers enters from the left. The central megabuilding shifts toward the right side of the frame. A large digital screen becomes visible on the left, adding to the dense urban visual complexity.

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals more of the left-side cityscape as the pan continues. A flying vehicle crosses the sky from left to right, while steam vents release vapor from nearby rooftops. The warm golden hour light continues to bathe the dense cyberpunk architecture, highlighting the intricate details of the megabuilding and surrounding neon signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous sweeping pan across a dense cyberpunk cityscape that shifts its focus from a central residential megabuilding toward a sprawling cluster of neon-lit skyscrapers. It begins with a wide view of the massive megabuilding while the camera glides left, revealing towering structures adorned with glowing billboards and a distant flying vehicle cruising through the golden hour sky. As the movement continues, the initial buildings exit the frame to make room for a new array of skyscrapers and a large digital screen emerging from the left. The scene then expands further across the urban horizon, where another flying vehicle crosses the sky and steam vents release vapor from nearby rooftops. Finally, the camera settles on the intricate details of the left-side cityscape, all bathed in a warm, golden light that highlights the surrounding neon signage.
